_comment: z/OS Connect API requester example — a descriptor that lets a CICS/IMS program (COBOL/PL-I) CALL an outbound REST API as if it were a local subroutine. The z/OS Connect Designer pairs an OpenAPI document with request/response data-structure mappings derived from copybooks; this JSON is a representative requester descriptor. The `api` block references the target REST API; `operations` bind each REST operation to the high-level language interface and its mapped request/response structures (which originate from COBOL copybooks — see ../cobol-copybook).

apiRequester.name: InventoryRequester
apiRequester.description: Outbound API requester invoked from a CICS COBOL program.
